All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AdminController
Administrative controller responsible for ingesting data from external NASA APIs.
AnnotationController
Handles annotation operations for items.
AnnotationEntity
Represents a user-created annotation attached to a media item.
AnnotationMapper
Utility class responsible for converting Annotation objects between DTOs and entity models.
AnnotationRepository
Repository for managing AnnotationEntity persistence.
AnnotationRequest
Request object used to create a new annotation.
AnnotationResponse
Response object representing an annotation.
AnnotationService
Service responsible for managing annotations.
AnnotationServiceImpl
Default implementation of AnnotationService.
ApodResponse
 
CollectionController
Manages user collections of saved items.
CollectionEntity
Represents a user-defined collection of media items.
CollectionItemEntity
Join entity linking collections and items.
CollectionItemId
Composite primary key for the collection_items table.
CollectionMapper
Utility class for converting Collection DTOs to entity models and vice versa.
CollectionRepository
Repository responsible for CollectionEntity persistence.
CollectionRequest
Request object used to create a new collection.
CollectionResponse
Response object representing a collection.
CollectionService
Service responsible for managing user collections.
CollectionServiceImpl
 
CustomUserDetails
Adapter that exposes UserEntity data in a format compatible with Spring Security.
CustomUserDetailsService
Service responsible for loading user data during authentication.
DuplicateResourceException
Thrown when an attempt is made to create a resource that already exists.
GlobalExceptionHandler
Centralized handler for application exceptions.
ItemController
Provides endpoints for managing stored NASA media items.
ItemEntity
Represents a media item retrieved from a NASA data source.
ItemMapper
Mapper responsible for translating Item DTOs to entity models and response objects.
ItemRepository
Repository for ItemEntity persistence.
ItemRequest
Request object used to create or store a NASA media item.
ItemResponse
Response object representing a stored NASA media item.
ItemService
Service responsible for managing NASA media items.
ItemServiceImpl
 
NasaApiConfig
Configuration class responsible for creating a shared RestClient used to communicate with NASA APIs.
NasaApodClient
Client responsible for interacting with NASA's Astronomy Picture of the Day (APOD) API.
NasaImageClient
Client used to search NASA's public image library.
NasaImageSearchResponse
Represents the JSON response returned by NASA's image search API.
NasaImageSearchResponse.Collection
Container holding the returned items.
NasaImageSearchResponse.Data
Metadata describing the media asset.
NasaImageSearchResponse.Item
Individual search result entry.
NasaImageSearchResponse.Link
Link to a preview or thumbnail image.
NasaIngestService
Service responsible for ingesting data from NASA APIs.
NasaIngestServiceImpl
 
NasaOsdrClient
Client responsible for querying NASA's Open Science Data Repository (OSDR).
NasaSourceApi
Identifies the NASA API that provided a media item.
NasaSpaceMediaExplorerApplication
 
ResourceNotFoundException
Thrown when a requested resource cannot be found.
RoleEntity
Defines a security role used for authorization.
RoleRepository
Repository for managing RoleEntity persistence.
RoleService
Service responsible for resolving application roles.
RoleServiceImpl
 
RoleType
Supported application roles used for authorization.
SecurityConfig
Configures application security settings.
Test
 
UserController
Administrative controller for managing application users.
UserCreateRequest
Request object used to create a new user account.
UserEntity
Represents an application user.
UserMapper
Mapper responsible for converting User DTOs into entity models and response objects.
UserRepository
Repository responsible for UserEntity persistence.
UserResponse
Response object representing a user.
UserRoleEntity
Join entity connecting users and roles.
UserRoleId
Composite primary key for the user_roles table.
UserService
Service responsible for managing application users.
UserServiceImpl
